calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Continued To Jan-18-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Philip Kilduff, Esq. appeared with plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank.
No appearance by defendant Barbara Ruffin-Boston.
Default was entered against defendant was filed on March 3, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed March 3, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 2, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, and against the Defaulted Defendant Barbara Ruffin-Boston as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,825.86.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,723.14.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $465.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $57,014.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Continued To Dec-13-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 12/13/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
